brand.name: Chaioz
brand.mission: Bringing authentic Indian chai to Adelaide with a premium, late-night social vibe.
brand.tone: Warm, authentic, premium, slightly playful, culturally rich but modern

spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (E1 standard) - use p-8 to p-12 for bento grids to allow breathing room.

surfaces.bento_card: bg-[#0A1413] border border-[#1A2E2C] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#E8A84A]/50 transition-colors duration-300
surfaces.control_room_card: bg-[#0A1413] border border-[#1A2E2C] rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm

motion.page_load: staggered fade-up for bento grid items

hero_section.background: hero_chai_dark image with bg-gradient-to-t from-[#050B0A] via-[#050B0A]/60 to-transparent
hero_section.content: H1 using Brioche font ('Your late-night chai ritual'), primary CTA button ('Order Pickup'), secondary CTA ('View Menu'). Aligned to center-bottom for cinematic feel.

items.content: The Story of Chaioz (Image + Text block)

marquee.text: AUTHENTIC INDIAN CHAI ✦ LATE NIGHT EATS ✦ STREET FOOD ✦ BUN MASKA ✦

menu_page.layout: Sticky category sidebar (left, 3 cols) + Item grid (right, 9 cols).
menu_page.item_card: Image on top (max-h-48 object-cover), title, description, price, and 'Add' button. Minimalist dark aesthetic.

cart_drawer.layout: Right-side slide-over using Shadcn Sheet. Contains order items, pickup time selector (Shadcn Select), and prominent 'Checkout' button in Saffron.

dashboard_admin.layout: Control Room Grid (Dense). Sidebar nav, topbar with user profile.
dashboard_admin.widgets: Flat cards, 1px border border-[#1A2E2C]. Use Recharts for daily revenue and AOV charts.

hero_backgrounds.usage: Main landing page hero image. Use with bottom-to-top dark gradient overlay.
Background texture for sections like 'Why Chaioz' or Loyalty tiers to inject Indian authenticity without overpowering content.

food_and_product.usage: E-commerce store hero background or retail product category cover.

lifestyle_and_vibe.usage: Authentic street market vibe, use for 'Our Story' section.
Late-night social spot visual, use for 'Visit Us' or Footer background.

critical_rules: Must implement custom font 'Brioche' using standard @font-face CSS. Only use for Headings (H1, H2).
Never use generic sans-serif (Inter, Roboto) for headings.
The primary theme is DARK. Use `#050B0A` as the main body background, not standard black.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST include a kebab-case, role-based `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-order-button"`).
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the media_assets section.
Buttons must explicitly define hover text color (e.g., `hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-[#050B0A]`).
Implement Shadcn UI for complex interactives (Select, Sheet for Cart Drawer, Dialog, Form), but deeply customize the CSS to match the Jewel & Luxury archetype. Strip the default 'Vercel-look'.
Use Lucide React for icons. Keep icon size consistent (`w-5 h-5`).
E-commerce elements: Provide 'Add to Cart' buttons with clear feedback (Toast notification using Sonner).
tailwind_config_steps: Extend colors using the provided palette in `design_system.colors`.
Ensure container has centered margins and sensible padding.
